project.name: MetaPlatform 管理后台
project.designRead: enterprise admin console / internal builders & operators / calm enterprise trust / high density / avoid purple neon AI hero
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Enterprise low-code platform admin, cool neutral slate + indigo blue primary, Inter + Noto Sans SC, sidebar-nav dashboard density, border-first surfaces.

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: indigo blue primary #3b82f6, slate neutrals, category tints (ai violet, data cyan, tool amber)
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: restrained radius: sm=4, md=8, lg=12, xl=16, full=9999
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter + system fallback for Latin, Noto Sans SC for CJK, mono for code
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: border-first cards, left-aligned content, subtle hover states
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: white surfaces, #e2e8f0 borders, shadow alpha <= 0.05 for static, 0.12 for float
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: emoji-style category icons, monospace badges for IDs/codes
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: subtle hover/focus transitions, no dramatic animations

pages.title: 页面配置管理
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean management table with quick-generate card grid — the hub for page lifecycle

pages.title: AI 对话
pages.visualNorthStar: Full-height chat interface with session sidebar — the conversational AI entry point

pages.title: 能力中心
pages.visualNorthStar: Filterable 3-column capability card grid with expand-to-execute interaction

pages.title: 集成中心
pages.visualNorthStar: Connector management with type-colored cards and status indicators
